biological_replicate: 2 types of biological units (conidia, mycelial explants)
the fungus was grown in liquid medium using conidia or mycelial explants as an inoculum.
technical_replicate: Eight biological replicates and three technical replicates (ten reads each) were performed.
experimental_design: BcEVs could be produced in liquid as well as on solid media
factor_value: BcEVs can stimulate cell growth in B. cinerea
number_of_biological_replicates: the fungus was grown in liquid medium using conidia or mycelial explants
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates and 6 fractions imply 12 total samples
